AxReportDesign.Name: BankBalanceDesign
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>09c844d3-1d1f-4713-b81a-2025900405d0</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="BankBalanceDataSet"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="From Date"> <Value>=Parameters!BankBalanceDataSet_From_Date.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="To Date"> <Value>=Parameters!BankBalanceDataSet_To_Date.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM EtgbankbalancereportRDP.ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="BankAccountID"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.BankAccountID</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="BankName"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.BankName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ClosingBalance"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.ClosingBalance</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ClosingBalanceLocal"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.ClosingBalanceLocal</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ClosingBalanceReporting"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.ClosingBalanceReporting</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ClosingBalanceTB"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.ClosingBalanceTB</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Credit"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.Credit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="CurrencyCode"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.CurrencyCode</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Debit"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.Debit</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="OpeningBalance"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.OpeningBalance</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="Total"> <DataField>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.1.Total</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.Double</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>BankBalanceDataSet</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Tablix Name="Tablix1"> <TablixBody> <TablixColumns> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> </TablixColumns> <TablixRows> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox1"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Bank Account ID</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox1</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox3"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Bank Name</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox3</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox5"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Currency Code</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox5</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox17"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Opening Balance</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox17</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox19"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Debit</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox19</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox21"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Credit</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox21</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox23"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Total</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox23</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox7"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Closing Balance</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox7</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox2"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Clsoing TB</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox2</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox9"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Closing Balance Local</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox9</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Textbox11"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Closing Balance Reporting</Value> <Style /> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox11</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> </TablixCells> </TablixRow> <TablixRow> <Height>0.25in</Height> <TablixCells> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="BankAccountID"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!BankAccountID.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>BankAccountID</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.BankAccountID</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.BankAccountID</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.BankAccountID</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="BankName"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!BankName.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>BankName</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.BankName</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.BankName</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.BankName</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="CurrencyCode"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!CurrencyCode.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>CurrencyCode</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>String</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.CurrencyCode</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.CurrencyCode</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.CurrencyCode</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="OpeningBalance"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!OpeningBalance.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>OpeningBalance</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>Float</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.OpeningBalance</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.OpeningBalance</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.OpeningBalance</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Debit"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!Debit.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Debit</rd:DefaultName> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Debit</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Credit"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!Credit.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Credit</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>Float</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Credit</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Credit</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Credit</Value> </CustomProperty> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="Total"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!Total.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Total</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXDataType</Name> <Value>Float</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTFormat</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Total</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTTextAlign</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Total</Value> </CustomProperty> <CustomProperty> <Name>AXEDTDirection</Name> <Value>ETG_BankBalanceTableTmp.Total</Value> </CustomProperty> </CustomProperties> <Style> <Border> <Color>LightGrey</Color> <Style>Solid</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> </CellContents> </TablixCell> <TablixCell> <CellContents> <Textbox Name="ClosingBalance"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Fields!ClosingBalance.Value</Value> <Style> <FontWeight>=IIf(Fields!BankAccountID.Value = "TOTAL", "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> "Bold", "Normal")</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>ClosingBalanceReporting</rd:DefaultName> <CustomProperties> <CustomProperty>
